selection_policy.primary_rule: Select the strongest current candidates for the new metric-gated scientific pipeline family.
selection_policy.secondary_rule: Prefer tasks where intermediate scientific measurement fidelity is likely more important than generic stage decomposition.
notes: This is a sidecar experiment slice, not part of the main round-0 candidate bank.
The first pass compares only against C0/C1, not against the existing 7-schema bank.
The slice intentionally mixes benchmark-threshold and tolerance-sensitive scientific tasks to stress-test whether the schema preserves metric-critical upstream reasoning.

tasks.selection_note: Waveform -> pick -> associate -> event-time F1 gate; clearest motivating outlier.
Raw traces -> P/S picks -> F1 thresholds; direct stress test for signal-measurement fidelity.
Scientific simulation and calibration task; useful to test whether the schema helps outside pure signal extraction.
Noisy lightcurve preprocessing with a compact final output; tests whether the schema still protects upstream signal analysis.
